servicesPage.title: What We Offer
servicesPage.intro: We help organizations adopt AI and IoT with practical automation, integrations, models, connected products, delivery, and expert consulting.
servicesPage.mapLead: Whether you are automating operations, integrating models, or shipping connected products, we partner with you to turn ideas into dependable systems.

cards.title: AI Automation
cards.details: Automate repetitive work and business workflows with AI so your teams spend time on decisions that matter, not manual busywork.

cards.title: AI Integration
cards.details: Embed AI into your existing systems—APIs, data pipelines, and applications—with reliable patterns for auth, observability, and safe rollout.

cards.title: AI Models
cards.details: Choose, train, evaluate, and deploy models that fit your domain, from prototyping through production monitoring and iteration.

cards.title: IoT Solution
cards.details: Design end-to-end IoT architectures: devices, connectivity, edge logic, and cloud backends that scale with your product roadmap.

cards.title: IoT Delivery
cards.details: Ship IoT programs with provisioning, fleet management, OTA updates, and field rollout support so hardware and software stay aligned in production.

cards.title: Consulting
cards.details: Strategy and hands-on guidance for AI and IoT initiatives—roadmaps, risk reviews, vendor choices, and execution plans tied to your outcomes.
